summary: Verified SDI Fatture Ricevute deduplication fix: all 7 tests passed. import-xml returns 409 on duplicate, import-xml-batch skips duplicates with dettaglio_saltate, preview-xml shows duplicata=true, unique index on fr_id exists

TEST1_first_import.result: HTTP 200 - Successfully imported TEST-2RATE-001 from Lasametalli SpA (€1000)

TEST2_reimport_blocked.result: HTTP 409 - 'Fattura già importata: n. TEST-2RATE-001 del 2026-03-08 da Lasametalli SpA'

TEST5_batch_both_existing.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/import-xml-batch with both files already imported

TEST6_no_duplicate_fr_ids.description: MongoDB check: no duplicate fr_ids in fatture_ricevute collection

TEST7_unique_index_exists.description: MongoDB check: unique index on fatture_ricevute.fr_id

dedup_logic_verified.description: Deduplication uses $or with two conditions for robustness
dedup_logic_verified.purpose: Catches both named invoices from XML and unnamed from FIC sync

critical_code_review_comments: Code verified: import-xml (lines 593-606) correctly returns HTTP 409 with 'Fattura già importata' message
Code verified: import-xml-batch (lines 764-783) correctly populates dettaglio_saltate array with skipped invoices
Code verified: preview-xml (lines 960-974) correctly sets duplicata=true for existing invoices
Code verified: Unique index 'unique_fr_id' on fr_id provides DB-level duplicate prevention
seed_data_creation: Used test XML files: /app/backend/tests/test_xml_2rate.xml (Lasametalli SpA, €1000, 2 rate) and /app/backend/tests/test_xml_nopagamento.xml (Ferramenta Rossi, €2000, no payment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SDI deduplication fix verified. All 7 tests pass: first import OK, reimport returns 409, preview shows duplicata=true, batch import skips duplicates with dettaglio_saltate, no duplicate fr_ids in DB, unique index exists. Test documents cleaned up after tests.
